GetNormalDistribution(int, double, double)

Returns a histogram containing a specified number of bins describing a normal/gaussian distribution with a specified mean and standard deviation.

virtual IRasterHistogram GetNormalDistribution(int nBins, double Mean, double StdDev)

nBins int
Mean double
StdDev double

GetUniformDistribution(int)
